items.title: Perk GOES OFF: 'You're TRIPPIN If You Think the Knicks Can't Win It All
items.body_excerpt: The crew debates whether the Knicks' 11-game playoff streak is the most dominant run in NBA history, measuring it against the 2017 Warriors, the 1999 Spurs, and the 2001 Lakers. Perk goes off on the doubters while Rich argues the Knicks are more complete on both ends than his…
